no_solution_leakage.reason: The 'Required Behavior' section explicitly states the exact fix: 'demo.config must be assigned the value returned by demo.get_config_file()' and 'The swap_blocks method must still delegate to the parent class implementation (super().swap_blocks(demo))'. solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_not_stub asserts 'len(body_stmts) >= 2' in the swap_blocks method body via AST inspection, and test_swap_blocks_calls_parent checks for _parent_swap_called on the reloader instance (set by the mock parent). An alternative correct fix that places the config reassignment in postrun instead of swap_blocks (which is equally valid) would fail these tests because swap_blocks wouldn't have the required 2+ statements.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_swap_blocks_regenerates_config checks that demo.config equals the value from get_config_file (not the initial {'stale': True}), test_postrun_updates_config_on_swap checks the config is refreshed after postrun, and test_swap_blocks_calls_parent checks parent delegation. A stub/pass/return-None implementation would fail these since demo.config would remain stale.
